subcodes.title: Words to the Persian friends, spoken on 1912-12-28
subcodes.first_line: If the believers of God had lived in accord with the good pleasure of the Blessed Perfection, all the people of the world would have been Baha'is by now
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @Manifestation of God as sun, @unity; oneness of humanity
